deliverables.purpose: Markdown evidence grading table with rubric, calculations, uncertainty notes, validation checks, and claim-by-claim decisions.

needs_review: Claim A: effect size, confidence interval, exact biomarker definition, comparator arm, follow-up duration, multiplicity control
Claim B: adjusted effect estimate, confounder set, exposure definition, outcome definition, follow-up duration
Claim C: species/model, endpoint, effect metric, replication, translational relevance
Claim D: primary studies cited by the review, search strategy, inclusion/exclusion criteria, evidence synthesis method

artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
